default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress on Udemy's content strategy, address concerns about instructor involvement, and align on website architecture approach.](https://fathom.video/share/qyyzxWkewezvJEiqzYM6yyMbkPEyQkdw?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Instructor involvement is crucial for Udemy's content differentiation; process for integration needs definition](https://fathom.video/share/qyyzxWkewezvJEiqzYM6yyMbkPEyQkdw?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [95% human-generated content score requirement clarified; GrowthX content currently meets this benchmark](https://fathom.video/share/qyyzxWkewezvJEiqzYM6yyMbkPEyQkdw?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [Proposed website architecture (business.udemy.com/skillshift) aligns with team's thinking; needs further discussion on branding and URL structure](https://fathom.video/share/qyyzxWkewezvJEiqzYM6yyMbkPEyQkdw?tab=summary&timestamp=1438.0)

## Topics

### Instructor Integration in Content Strategy

  - [Krista emphasized instructors as cornerstone of Udemy's content differentiation](https://fathom.video/share/qyyzxWkewezvJEiqzYM6yyMbkPEyQkdw?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Current process involves instructors in all content types (blogs, video shorts, social media)](https://fathom.video/share/qyyzxWkewezvJEiqzYM6yyMbkPEyQkdw?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [GrowthX to define process for instructor involvement in new content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/qyyzxWkewezvJEiqzYM6yyMbkPEyQkdw?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [Potential approaches: spotlight instructor stories, leverage course transcripts](https://fathom.video/share/qyyzxWkewezvJEiqzYM6yyMbkPEyQkdw?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Timeline for defining this process is critical to avoid workflow delays](https://fathom.video/share/qyyzxWkewezvJEiqzYM6yyMbkPEyQkdw?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)

### Human-Generated Content Scoring

  - [Udemy uses internal tool (Writer) to ensure 95% human-generated content score](https://fathom.video/share/qyyzxWkewezvJEiqzYM6yyMbkPEyQkdw?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
  - [Serves as protection against potential future AI content penalties](https://fathom.video/share/qyyzxWkewezvJEiqzYM6yyMbkPEyQkdw?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
  - [GrowthX's sample content scored 100% human-generated](https://fathom.video/share/qyyzxWkewezvJEiqzYM6yyMbkPEyQkdw?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
  - [Focus on customer-centric, value-driven content aligns with Udemy's goals](https://fathom.video/share/qyyzxWkewezvJEiqzYM6yyMbkPEyQkdw?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)

### Website Architecture Proposal

  - [Recommended approach: business.udemy.com/skillshift](https://fathom.video/share/qyyzxWkewezvJEiqzYM6yyMbkPEyQkdw?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
  - [Balances SEO value, user experience, and technical constraints](https://fathom.video/share/qyyzxWkewezvJEiqzYM6yyMbkPEyQkdw?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)
  - [Subnavigation structure to maintain hierarchy and distinct branding](https://fathom.video/share/qyyzxWkewezvJEiqzYM6yyMbkPEyQkdw?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Discussion on including "skillshift" in URL structure vs. using "blog"](https://fathom.video/share/qyyzxWkewezvJEiqzYM6yyMbkPEyQkdw?tab=summary&timestamp=1668.0)
  - [Team leans towards branded blog concept (e.g., "Skillshift blog") with clear navigation and CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/qyyzxWkewezvJEiqzYM6yyMbkPEyQkdw?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)

### Content Differentiation Strategy

  - [Udemy can't compete with Coursera's quantity (140,000+ articles)](https://fathom.video/share/qyyzxWkewezvJEiqzYM6yyMbkPEyQkdw?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [Focus on quality and unique instructor-driven content as differentiator](https://fathom.video/share/qyyzxWkewezvJEiqzYM6yyMbkPEyQkdw?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
  - [Blend AI efficiency with human expertise and instructor insights](https://fathom.video/share/qyyzxWkewezvJEiqzYM6yyMbkPEyQkdw?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule follow-up meeting (Tuesday) to discuss website architecture and instructor integration](https://fathom.video/share/qyyzxWkewezvJEiqzYM6yyMbkPEyQkdw?tab=summary&timestamp=2070.0)
  - [Kyle to create clear PRD for web development team](https://fathom.video/share/qyyzxWkewezvJEiqzYM6yyMbkPEyQkdw?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
  - [Add Justin to meeting with Steph regarding web resources](https://fathom.video/share/qyyzxWkewezvJEiqzYM6yyMbkPEyQkdw?tab=summary&timestamp=2094.0)
  - [Continue debate on "Skillshift" branding vs. user understanding before launch](https://fathom.video/share/qyyzxWkewezvJEiqzYM6yyMbkPEyQkdw?tab=summary&timestamp=1916.0)
  - [Align on URL structure and navigation to balance branding and SEO needs](https://fathom.video/share/qyyzxWkewezvJEiqzYM6yyMbkPEyQkdw?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)
